project.name: My SaaS Platform
project.description: A full-stack SaaS application with authentication, billing, and a dashboard.

milestones.title: Foundation & Setup
milestones.description: Establish the project skeleton, tooling, CI/CD, and core infrastructure.

milestones.title: Authentication
milestones.description: Implement full user authentication flow including registration, login, and password reset.

milestones.title: Billing & Subscriptions
milestones.description: Integrate Stripe for subscription management, webhooks, and customer portal.

tickets.title: Initialize repository and tooling
tickets.description: Set up the monorepo structure, linters, formatters, and pre-commit hooks to enforce code quality from day one.
tasks: Create repository and branch protection rules
Set up GitHub Actions CI pipeline
acceptance_criteria: CI pipeline runs on every pull request
Pre-commit hooks block commits that fail lint
README documents how to run the project locally

tickets.title: Design and implement database schema
tickets.description: Define the initial PostgreSQL schema for users, teams, and subscriptions using an ORM migration tool.
tasks: Design ERD for users, teams, and subscriptions
acceptance_criteria: Migrations run cleanly on a fresh database
ERD diagram is committed to the repo under /docs
All tables have created_at and updated_at columns

tickets.title: User registration and login endpoints
tickets.description: Build REST API endpoints for user registration and JWT-based login, including input validation and password hashing.
tasks: POST /auth/register — validate input, hash password, create user
POST /auth/login — verify credentials, return JWT + refresh token
Add rate limiting to auth routes
acceptance_criteria: Passwords are hashed with bcrypt (cost factor >= 12)
JWT expires in 15 minutes; refresh token in 7 days
Returns 429 after 10 failed login attempts per IP
learning_goals: Learn secure password storage best practices

tickets.title: Stripe subscription checkout flow
tickets.description: Implement a Stripe Checkout session for new subscribers, handle the success/cancel redirects, and store subscription state in the database.
tasks: Create endpoint to initiate Checkout session
Store subscription ID and status on the user record
Display current plan on the account settings page
acceptance_criteria: Users can complete a checkout and gain access immediately
Webhook signature is validated before processing
Failed payments transition subscription to past_due status
Stripe Customer Portal link is available on account settings
